description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house enclosed by a wooden fence, featuring a flat roof design and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light. The structure is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes, with a prominent corner section that extends vertically and includes a unique, angular window arrangement. The property includes a spacious outdoor area with lounge chairs, a dining table, and a sculptural tree, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray materials, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The main entryway is sheltered and flanked by potted plants, while the rear and side yards offer additional seating and landscaped elements. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing geometric forms and open, airy spaces.
description: A sleek, modern multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring outdoor living spaces and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a sculptural tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive glass facade, outdoor lounge chairs, and dining area within the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary entrance, and more outdoor seating along the fence.
description_view_3: Back view revealing the service entrance, garage area, and the continuation of the modern geometric design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed with a flat overhang, flanked by potted plants and accessed via a small deck, featuring a minimalist door design.
